metadata.description: Azure AD Object ID of user/service principal to grant Key Vault access (optional)

Availability zone for the server (prevents auto-pause)

resources.name: [guid(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', format('app-{0}-xshopai-{1}', variables('services')[4].name, variables('suffix'))), resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName')), variables('keyVaultSecretsUserRoleId'))]
